message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series ewm_mean + expanding_quantile

Adds 2 live oracle tests:
- live_oracle_series_ewm_mean_span: 5-element float series, ewm(span=3.0).mean()
- live_oracle_series_expanding_quantile: 5-element float series, expanding().quantile(0.5)

[bd-frankenpandas-v19a6]
